title: athanasia tanacetifolia
intro: Athanasia tanacetifolia, also known as Tanacetum balsamita, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athanasia tanacetifolia include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and promoting digestion. Athanasia tanacetifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
